data.description:
Skills: Perception +3, Stealth +6
Senses: passive Perception 13
Challenge: 1 (200 XP)

Keen Smell. The liger has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
Keen Hearing and Smell. The wolf has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
Pounce. If the liger moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and hits with a claw attack, it can make a bite attack as part of the same action.
